evidence: Filename and Format.ini serialNumber agree.
All 200 PictureInfo lines record Exposure width 900 ms.
All 200 PictureInfo lines record Exposure delay 0 ms.
All 200 PictureInfo lines record Sync.A width 4 us; physical gate attribution is not established.
All 200 PictureInfo lines record Sync.B width 4 us; physical gate attribution is not established.

The control is labeled gain, but no source explicitly identifies it as calibrated MCP gain.
Sync channels are recorded, but their mapping to the intensifier gate is undocumented.

No per-folder trigger-mode record.
TIFF encoding is verified; Format.ini settings are not a per-folder immutable snapshot.
No TIFF/PictureInfo temperature field.
Directory and INI path encode date, but TIFF has no DateTime tag and manifest mtimes reflect later file handling.
Folder and mtime order are monotonic, but no immutable acquisition log confirms causality.
Sequential 200-frame capture with constant settings; scene identifier absent.
